arts.ttl: Leicester transfer news as Man Utd deal chased but one thing must happen first
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy wants to bring Toby Collyer to Leicester City as he looks for a favour from Manchester United. The Dutchman is eager to bolster his squad when the January transfer window opens next month and has reportedly targeted a move for United youngster Collyer.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss in damning verdict on Leicester City situation and says 'it makes no sense'
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner has issued a withering verdict on Odsonne Edouard's loan at Leicester City and insisted recalling the striker "makes no sense". From our side, It makes no sense to bring him back because if he’s not playing at Leicester, then why should he play for Crystal Palace?

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Brighton as Ruud van Nistelrooy forced into change
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Hermansen; Justin, Coady, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Ndidi, Soumare; McAteer, Ayew, El Khannouss; Vardy. It means Conor Coady and Jannik Vestergaard again for the City centre-back pairing, with Wout Faes left out for the second game running.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Arsenal - Premier League: Live scores, team news and updates as Mikel Arteta's side fall behind early on
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates as Fulham host Arsenal, Brighton travel to Leicester and Ipswich take on Bournemouth in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Four Leicester City players walking suspension tightrope against Brighton
arts.sum: Four Leicester City players have to be on their best behaviour against Brighton to avoid a suspension. That means avoiding a booking against Brighton and the following four fixtures against Newcastle, Wolves, Liverpool and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: How to watch Leicester City vs Brighton - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Leicester City will look to make it two wins from two under new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy on Sunday following a perfect start to life under the Dutchman. The match is being played at the King Power Stadium, the second home game for Leicester of the week.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Brighton Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Leicester will look to follow up their midweek win over West Ham with another three points when they welcome Brighton to the King Power in the Premier League today. Ahead of the clash, we’ve...

arts.ttl: Odsonne Edouard the unwanted as Celtic hero brutally cut off by 2 unimpressed managers amid looming transfer exit
arts.sum: The latest hammer blow for Edouard comes days after he was publicly dismissed by Oliver Glasner

arts.ttl: Storm Darragh chaos hands Jamie Vardy Leicester City hope amid Premier League chase
arts.sum: When Mohamed Salah scored for the seventh game in a row at Newcastle on Wednesday, fears of realisation creeped in that Liverpool forward could, in fact, match Jamie Vardy's record against the Foxes at Anfield on Boxing Day. Salah now can only get to scoring in nine successive Premier League matches before the Boxing Day visit of Van Nistelrooy's Foxes.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy's Jamie Vardy verdict hints at Leicester City captain's future
arts.sum: Jamie Vardy has the DNA to keep defying his age, Ruud van Nistelrooy has said, with the Leicester City manager brushing off suggestions the striker might need resting. “The way he is training and performing there is no need to look at resting him at this moment,” van Nistelrooy said.
